summary: Blackout Override | User Look up Page | Ul Validation - without User Info Lookup
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the "Blackout Override" tile on the dashboard
And !xray-attachment://6142ebd0-ab28-4d2c-8cb5-5c8a5c3113c1|width=944,height=656!
Then the user should land on the "User Info Lookup" page
And the user should see the "Blackout Override" in the header of the page
And the user should see the "User Lookup" and "Overrides" tabs at the top of the page
And the user should see a search bar labeled "Email"
And the instruction text should read:
"Search for a user by email to view their information, existing overrides and recent Conviva sessions"

steps.action: *When* the user clicks on the "Blackout Override" tile on the dashboard
